title: shinyapp-alphvantagepf
text: app designed Integrate four main asset classes analysis. example, equity, index FX exchange rate can plotted together. Minimize amount price information downloaded caching (degree possible) older price data. Provide interfaces capturing data requested adding external data internal cache. Provide easy ways create retrieve baskets assets. Use modern design elements much possible, particular gt package dygraphs package. latter used via “sister” package FinanceGraphs conventions helpful know using app

title: shinyapp-alphvantagepf
text: app requires modest amount setup using. can run app first run, following screen shown, AVOPTS tab selected. first order business set Alphavantage API keys. , just type copy API key entitlement status (Either delayed realtime), hit blue Set Opts button.  optional items can set capturing turned file called av_download.RD created updated specified dump directory. file named list data.tables, data.table containing downloaded data corresponding Alphavantage function (e.g. TIME_SERIES_DAILY). “cumulative” selected, data time-stamped added relevant data.table. , data replaced relevant key (usually SYMBOL). user can use file integrate search histories analytics, rolling Markdown file.

title: shinyapp-alphvantagepf
text: Securities seldom analyzed isolation. easy create use ad-hoc groups securities app. create list, First, type new name list list box shown , Hit Enter. Second, type components (separated semi-colons) hit set button. get assets list, select desired list dropdown hit get button.  can see table current asset lists running “Gen:Inventory” command, can add asset lists outside app using av_add_assetgroups()

title: shinyapp-alphvantagepf
text: run analyses, select desired item dropdowns press blue RUN button. One graphs tables shown MAIN tab, additional data possible DETAIL tab. Graph events decorations can specified first two boxes, annotations last level 5 turning points used defaults. options possible detailed fgts_dygraph() documentation. Empty boxes clean graphs. date ranges plotted come “dts” box (see conventions), recent data can focused using FocusPct slider. example, slider set 50pct, date string "-2y::" graph show last year data, can slid back see entire 2 year period. Note status messages sent console “Status Msgs” box checked output data analysis copied clipboad “copyTable” box checked.

title: shinyapp-alphvantagepf
text: Data plotted raw form unless Rebase options used. Rebasing start normalize series 100 start window. (example , rebase occur first point plotted 2 years prior today). Rebasing set focus point, rebasing occurs point set slider. alternative rebasing plot first asset ’s axis, can done selecting "splitts" "TSGraphOpts" box. options can selected box Highlighting first series thicker line Adding Labels showing last value series title Adding hi-low shading, data available. Changing line colors (via "fgts colorset" setting "AVOPTS" tab.) Event codes can also specified "events" box. See fg_get_dates_of_interest() Dygraphs vignette can single day events highlighted ranges dates. Also, time series appear daily plotted step functions.

title: shinyapp-alphvantagepf
text: table shows current analyses can run. Select wish hit RUN button. Notes 1 Due Alphavantage limitations, search returns tickers begin search term. Graphing options described . graph can interactively zoomed reset double click. Two synchronized graphs can used selecting option Line 1 Line 2. Total return data used unless box unchecked. data augmented live data box checked. Graphs show active returns, .e. Total return asset Line 1 less first asset (typically benchmark index) Line 2. Rolling correlations full period betas also shown. Volatilitity parameters Histvolparams box passed [TTR::volatility()] function. Results displayed OPTIONS tab. Results displayed NEWS tab. example, suppose wish look active returns three popular chip manufacturers Nasdaq 100 broad index. Put tickers interest Line 1, index Line 2. (one tickers Line 2, first used.) Select TS:ActiveTS hit run. app get whatever data needs, typically cache, augmented recent (live) data produce following output:

what: WAdding data and integrating different asset classes.
title: shinyapp-alphvantagepf
text: data can also added externally using [av_add_data()] function. time series can added, time series can guaranteed updated Alphavantage calls. One difficulty Alphavantages’ API platform different function calls (returned data sets) major asset class. app integrates one price table, expense know asset type data added. app tries determine asset class symbol update using av_get_pf() calls best can. Specifically, new ticker checked current Index lists, cryptocurrency lists, Alphavantage’s "SYMBOL_SEARCH". several tickers passed , can quite expensive, Alphavantage tends limit data usage many calls made succession. possible, ’s much better predetermine asset type (one c("Equity","ETF","Index","FX","Crypto")) advance pass [av_add_data()] call runtime. Data completely exogenous Alphavantage can also added app’s cached data set. asset type isn’t specified determined, ’s assumed "user" asset type isn’t updated, can still plotted used. example, suppose wish plot prices common credit ETF FRED’s FEDFUNDS data. download add programmatically. Generic data needs manipulated form app expects, data downloaded Alphavantage already form. data added can plotted using "TS:PriceTS" analytic, seen . Note monthly time series needs used care, since doesn’t correspond actual Fed Meetings.
code: # av_add_data can be used simply, but av_add_data(av_get_pf("IBM","TIME_SERIES_DAILY_ADJUSTED"))  # For many assets, use this asset_df <- data.frame(symbol=c("HYG"),type=c("ETF"),currency=c("USD"), name=c("HY ETF")) av_add_data(av_get_pf("HYG","TIME_SERIES_DAILY_ADJUSTED"), assettypes=asset_df)  # External Data suppressMessages(require(quantmod)) ffdta <- as.data.table(quantmod::getSymbols("FEDFUNDS",src="FRED",auto.assign=FALSE)) ffdta <- ffdta[,.(DT_ENTRY=index,close=FEDFUNDS,adjusted_close=FEDFUNDS,symbol="FEDFUNDS")] av_add_data(ffdta)  dump_inv() |> gt()

title: shinyapp-alphvantagepf
text: Planned improvements currently include Earnings dividends incorporated plots including E/P analysis. Ability plug user-defined functions access internal data store. Correlation hedging analyses. Interface events aesthetics sets relevant FinanceGraphs

title: usage-alphvantagepf
code: av_api_key("YOUR_API_KEY") print(av_api_key()) #> [1] "YOUR_API_KEY" NA

title: usage-alphvantagepf
text: find parameters defaults provided alphavantagepf package, use av_funhelp() Required parameters listed “R” optional parameters (default provided package) listed “O”
code:
av_funhelp("SERIES_INTRADAY") #> Function: TIME_SERIES_INTRADAY #> Category: equity #>  #> Parameters: #> R> symbol #> R> interval (default: 15min) #> O> adjusted #> O> extended_hours #> O> month #> O> outputsize (default: compact) #> O> entitlement (default: {entitlement}) #> [1] "Function: TIME_SERIES_INTRADAY
Category: equity

Parameters:
R> symbol
R> interval (default: 15min)
O> adjusted
O> extended_hours
O> month
O> outputsize (default: compact)
O> entitlement (default: {entitlement})
"

title: usage-alphvantagepf
text: API key set, use function av_get_pf() requires minimum two arguments, symbol (put first facilitate usage pipes) Alphavantage “function” av_fun. resulting output data.table depends type data requested. (Note data returned data.table, can cast tibbles necessary.) output always include symbol requested name av_fun used symbol isn’t relevent. variable isn’t wanted (e.g. called within grouping function group_by(symbol) |> ({}) set symbolvarnm="". data time series, columns type, passed along unchanged. data long-form (melted) datatable least following columns: symbol either symbol requested value av_fun symbol isn’t relevant. variable name data item value_str, value_num /value_df contain strings (converted numeric possible) (case value_df) nested data.frame. ltype inferred data-type, helpful selecting correct columns.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Derek Holmes. Author, maintainer, copyright holder.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Holmes D (2026). alphavantagepf: Comprehensive R Wrapper Shiny Interface 'Alphavantage Financial Data' API. R package version 0.7.6, https://github.com/derekholmes0/alphavantagepf.
code: @Manual{,   title = {alphavantagepf: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for 'Alphavantage Financial Data' API},   author = {Derek Holmes},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.7.6},   url = {https://github.com/derekholmes0/alphavantagepf}, }

what: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for Alphavantage Financial Data API
title: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for Alphavantage Financial Data API
text: data.table centric R Shiny interface Alpha Vantage API, geared towards personal finance applications. Data typically returned “melted” normalized forms several helper functions included extract data complex API calls. Shiny interface also provided download, visualize manage data sets assets, including ETFs FX. rusty abacus relative Bloomberg, allows users plot, summarize compare sets assets easily.

title: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for Alphavantage Financial Data API
text: can install development version alphavantagepf Github, production version CRAN. Load package.
code: # install.packages("pak") #pak::pak("derekholmes0/alphavantagepf") install.packages("alphavantagepf") library(alphavantagepf)

title: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for Alphavantage Financial Data API
text: Set API key obtained Alpha Vantage. paid access, include additional argument entitlement status, one two strings “delayed” “realtime”. “delayed” may needed historical quotes.
code: av_api_key("YOUR_API_KEY") print(av_api_key()) #> [1] "YOUR_API_KEY" NA  av_api_key("YOUR_API_KEY","delayed") print(av_api_key()) #> [1] "YOUR_API_KEY" "delayed"

title: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for Alphavantage Financial Data API
text: find parameters defaults provided alphavantagepf package, use av_funhelp() refer Alphavantage API calling conventions Alphavantage API documentation Required parameters listed “R” optional parameters (default provided package) listed “O”
code:
av_funhelp("SERIES_INTRADAY") #> Function: TIME_SERIES_INTRADAY #> Category: equity #>  #> Parameters: #> R> symbol #> R> interval (default: 15min) #> O> adjusted #> O> extended_hours #> O> month #> O> outputsize (default: compact) #> O> entitlement (default: {entitlement}) #> [1] "Function: TIME_SERIES_INTRADAY
Category: equity

Parameters:
R> symbol
R> interval (default: 15min)
O> adjusted
O> extended_hours
O> month
O> outputsize (default: compact)
O> entitlement (default: {entitlement})
"

title: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for Alphavantage Financial Data API
text: API key set, use function av_get_pf() requires minimum two arguments, symbol (put first facilitate usage pipes) Alphavantage “function” av_fun. Note data returned data.table, can cast tibbles necessary. symbol parameter required, can simple empty string functions don’t require symbol, e.g. TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS, list symbols bulk data, e.g. REALTIME_BULK_QUOTES. Symbols attached relevant,
code: av_get_pf("IBM","TIME_SERIES_INTRADAY") |> head()     symbol           timestamp  open  high   low close volume    <char>              <POSc> <num> <num> <num> <num>  <int> 1:    IBM 2026-01-02 11:00:00   292   293   291   292 141979 2:    IBM 2026-01-02 11:15:00   293   293   292   292 117760 av_get_pf(c("ORCL","Q","IBM","EWZ"),"REALTIME_BULK_QUOTES")    symbol     timestamp  open  high   low close   volume previous_close change change_percent extended_hours_quote    <char>      <POSc> <num> <num> <num> <num>    <int>          <num>  <num>          <num>               <lgcl> 1:      Q 2026-01-07 15:43:06  ... 2:    EWZ 2026-01-07 15:43:08  ... 3:    IBM 2026-01-07 15:43:08  ... 4:   ORCL 2026-01-07 15:43:08  ...

title: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for Alphavantage Financial Data API
text: alphavantagepf package includes default overrides defaults chosen Alphavantage API documentation. defaults can seen using av_funhelp() function, can seen calling av_get_pf() verbose=TRUE. overrides parameters can specified additional arguments av_get_pf(). example, get SMA using multiple horizon lengths can seen :
code: > av_get_pf("IBM","SMA",verbose=T,time_period=30) https://www.alphavantage.co/query?function   SMA                                           symbol                                       IBM                                           interval                                     daily                                         time_period                                  30    # << Normally 60 series_type                                  close                                         datatype                                     csv                                           > response: 200 type: application/x-download... url copied to clipboard       symbol       time   SMA       <char>     <IDat> <num>    1:    IBM 2026-01-06 304.1    2:    IBM 2026-01-05 303.7

previous_headings: More complex data and helpful data extractors.
title: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for Alphavantage Financial Data API
text: API calls return complex data, .e. data strings, numbers, nested data.frames collected together. av_get_pf() returns data natural format possible. example, time series melted, single name quotes . parameter control melted default value “melted”. melted can set TRUE (example) force suppress melting longer data.tables. example melted form makes sense TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS function, returns separate data.frames category. natural output Note symbol TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS isn’t used, still needs specified. Note data returned long form, always least three columns, symbol (cna changed av_get_pf() optional parameters). variable name data item returned, (e.g.) value_str value_df appropriate data components. data separated type delisting doesn’t done call. want just get, e.g. top losers, returned data can piped av_extract_df() function av_extract_df() function:
code: av_get_pf("","TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS")  Key: <variable>                symbol             variable     ltype           value_df                                value_str value_num                <char>               <char>    <char>             <list>                                   <char>     <num> 1: TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS         last_updated   numeric             [NULL]           2026-01-05 16:15:59 US/Eastern      2026 2: TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS             metadata character             [NULL] Top gainers, losers, and most actively t        NA 3: TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS most_actively_traded      list <data.frame[20x5]>                                     NULL        NA 4: TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS          top_gainers      list <data.frame[20x5]>                                     NULL        NA 5: TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS           top_losers      list <data.frame[20x5]>                                     NULL        NA av_get_pf("","TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS") |> av_extract_df("top_losers")      <char>   <num>         <num>            <char>     <num>             <char>  1:    OCG  0.0378       -0.0654         -63.3721% 216078762 TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS  2:   ZBIO 16.6100      -17.8900         -51.8551%   8034469 TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS  3:    SGN  0.4627       -0.4873         -51.2947%   2115079 TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS  4:  HYT^#  0.0186       -0.0164         -46.8571%    126059 TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS  5:  LVROW  0.0122       -0.0079         -39.3035%     10967 TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS

title: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for Alphavantage Financial Data API
text: HISTORICAL_OPTIONS function returns large set options given ticker, many long dated opent interest. av_grep_opts() helper can used narrow using comma-separated string specifying far maturities returned, e.g. Front Month (F) Back month (B) () expiration schedules used, e.g. (Q) Quarterly (M) monthlies. “Call”, “Put” “” , example, get closest monthly puts least 2 days maturity, use string “F,M,put”. default “F,M,call” (partial) results shown :
code: av_get_pf("IBM","HISTORICAL_OPTIONS") |> av_grep_opts("F,M,put",mindays=2)     symbol         contractID expiration strike   type  last  mark   bid bid_size   ask ask_size volume open_interest ...    <char>             <char>     <IDat>  <num> <char> <num> <num> <num>    <int> <num>    <int>  <int>      ... 1:    IBM IBM260116P00277500 2026-01-16    278    put  0.00  0.80  0.67      158  0.94      254      0      ... 2:    IBM IBM260116P00280000 2026-01-16    280    put  0.98  0.96  0.90      180  1.02       10    111      ... 3:    IBM IBM260116P00282500 2026-01-16    282    put  1.32  1.29  1.17      213  1.41      158     14      ...

code: av_get_pf(c("ORCL","IBM"),"ANALYTICS_FIXED_WINDOW") |> av_extract_analytics(separate_vars=TRUE)  av_get_pf: Reurning raw output; send to appropriate helper ----------------------------               variable_1              variable_2 variable_3               value                  <char>                  <char>     <char>              <char> 1:              symbols                    <NA>       <NA>            ORCL,IBM 2:               min_dt                    <NA>       <NA>          2025-12-09 3:               max_dt                    <NA>       <NA>          2026-01-06 4:                 ohlc                    <NA>       <NA>               Close 5:             interval                    <NA>       <NA>               DAILY 6: RETURNS_CALCULATIONS       CUMULATIVE_RETURN       ORCL   -0.12540062294046 7: RETURNS_CALCULATIONS       CUMULATIVE_RETURN        IBM -0.0257987632053596 8: RETURNS_CALCULATIONS STDDEV(ANNUALIZED=TRUE)       ORCL   0.575380551599422 9: RETURNS_CALCULATIONS STDDEV(ANNUALIZED=TRUE)        IBM   0.171846694713282

title: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for Alphavantage Financial Data API

title: Comprehensive R Wrapper and Shiny Interface for Alphavantage Financial Data API
text: Shiny interface included package manage visualize data. launch app, use av_runShiny(), start first step setting API key. (See Vignette items can set) API key set, type set symbols ae interested (separated semicolons) select analysis make. example, show normalized total return chart 3 common ETS, select “start” rebase start requested period ("-2y::"datestring) select TS:PriceTS get time series graph, press RUN. result .  TS:PriceTS run, av_runShiny() Call av_get_pf() parameters appropriate asset (e.g. TIME_SERIES_DAILY stocks, FX_DAILY FX), Save data internal data store, update existing data necessary, Plot interactive graph using fgts_dygraph() function. key features app include: app download data needed already cached. function av_add_data() can used add price data sources. point user wants make sure last observation live, check useLive app. Groups assets can saved “asset lists” save recalled name. , type list name box right yellow asset line, click save. recall items list, select name dropdown click get. assets list pasted relevant line. individual call av_get_pf() can cached directory users’ choice. Data saved named (Alphavantage function) list data.tables, can keyed (upserted) appended saved .Rd file. See Vignette. Analyses currently implemented include: Future plans include ability plug bespoke analyses tick data manipulation.

title: alphavantagepf: A lightweight R interface to the Alpha Vantage API — alphavantagepf
text: alphavantagepf package provides lightweight interface Alpha Vantage API. Alpha Vantage free source financial data many cases accurate Yahoo Finance Google Finance. Get free API KEY https://www.alphavantage.co. use R interface functions av_api_key("YOUR_KEY") set API key av_get_pf() function get financial data.

title: App database functions — av_add_data
text: Adds price data av_runShiny() internal data. Adds asset lists av_runShiny() internal data.

title: App database functions — av_add_data
code: av_add_data(indta, assettypes = NULL, delay = 0)  av_add_assetgroups(indta)

title: App database functions — av_add_data
text: indta data.frame two columns c("listnm","ticker") one lines "listnm" assettypes (default NULL)  optional data.frame minimal columns c(symbol,type,currency,name) descriptive data assets given indta.  specified, call av_get_pf(.,"SYMBOL_SEARCH") necessary determine asset type (one c("Equity","ETF","FX","Index","Crypto")) subsequent calls av_get_pf() delay (default 0) Seconds delay calls determine asset type future AV downloads. unused assettypes given.

title: App database functions — av_add_data
text: Nothing Nothing

title: App database functions — av_add_data
text: Entire set columns av_get_pf() can added. First date column renamed timestamp Lists specified normalized form.  Duplicate list names currently use replaced.

title: App database functions — av_add_data
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ av_add_data(av_get_pf("IBM","TIME_SERIES_DAILY_ADJUSTED")) asset_df <- data.frame(symbol=c("HYG"),type=c("ETF"),currency=c("USD"), name=c("HY ETF")) av_add_data(av_get_pf("HYG","TIME_SERIES_DAILY_ADJUSTED"), assettypes=asset_df)  suppressMessages(require(quantmod)) ffdta <- as.data.table(quantmod::getSymbols("FEDFUNDS",src="FRED",auto.assign=FALSE)) ffdta <- ffdta[,.(DT_ENTRY=index,close=FEDFUNDS,adjusted_close=FEDFUNDS,symbol="FEDFUNDS")] av_add_data(ffdta) } # }  if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ newtickers <- c("QQQ","QQQE","NDX") av_add_assetgroups(data.table(listnm=rep("nasdaq",length(newtickers)),ticker=newtickers)) # To remove an asset list, just use an empty string for the ticker av_add_assetgroups(data.table(listnm=c("new"),ticker=c(""))) } # }

title: Extract data from Alpha Vantage returned data — av_extract_df
text: indta data.table returned av_get() grepstring select variable (data item) unnest data.table returned av_get_pf melt Return data melted/normalized form empty_dt_onerror (default : FALSE): Return gracefully empty data.table requested item present. outputform (default : common, av_extract_fx() ):  Use common names REALTIME_BULK_QUOTES cols (default : columns:  av_extract_fx() ):  String List columns return ` separate_vars (default : FALSE)  separate multiple levels variable names new keys

what: Get financial data from the Alpha Vantage API — av_get_pf
title: Get financial data from the Alpha Vantage API — av_get_pf
text: Interface alphavantage API.

title: Get financial data from the Alpha Vantage API — av_get_pf
code: av_get_pf(   symbol,   av_fun,   symbolvarnm = "symbol",   dfonerror = TRUE,   melted = "default",   delay = 0,   verbose = FALSE,   ... )

title: Get financial data from the Alpha Vantage API — av_get_pf
text: symbol character string appropriate stock, fund, currency See parameter "symbol" Alpha Vantage API documentation. av_fun character string matching appropriate Alpha Vantage "function". See parameter "function" Alpha Vantage API documentation. symbolvarnm (default: symbol) Variable name symbol requested.  Set blank string wanted. dfonerror (default: TRUE) Return empty data.table error occurs melted (default: "default") String specifying melt, "default" chosen package, "TRUE|always" always melt, "FALSE|never" never melts delay (default: 0) Delay seconds API call, used embed within large single-symbol calls. verbose (default: FALSE) Print debug information helpful errors.  Also copies full url clipboard. ... Additional parameters overrides passed Alpha Vantage API. list parameters, visit Alpha Vantage API documentation.

title: Get financial data from the Alpha Vantage API — av_get_pf
text: Returns data.table results dependent function called. Mixed data returned melted data.table, possibly nested data.frames.  Time series returned data.tables.

title: Get financial data from the Alpha Vantage API — av_get_pf
text: av_fun argument replaces API parameter “function” function reserved name R. arguments match Alpha Vantage API parameters. need specify apikey, datatype, outputsize entitlement parameters arguments av_get_pf(). using, must set API key using av_api_key("YOUR_API_KEY"). outputsize defaults "full" unless overridden "compact ...." Required parameters symbol must passed named arguments via .... Optional parameters defaults can obtained  calling  av_funhelp() overridden via .... need specify datatype parameter argument av_get_pf(). function return data.table. ForEx "/" symbol details. FOREX symbols av_get_pf() function supplied "/" format, parsed Alpha Vantage API from_currency to_currency API parameters. Usage example: av_get_pf("USD/BRL", "FX_DAILY")

title: Get financial data from the Alpha Vantage API — av_get_pf
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ av_api_key("YOUR_API_KEY") av_api_key("YOUR_API_KEY","delayed") # if you have such access  # example code  # ---- 1.0 SINGLE NAME EQUITY SUMMARY INFORMATION AND SEARCH ----  av_get_pf("IBM","OVERVIEW") |> str() av_get_pf("EWZ","ETF_PROFILE") av_get_pf("EWZ","ETF_PROFILE") |> av_extract_df("holdings") av_get_pf("","SYMBOL_SEARCH",keywords="COMMERCE")  # ---- 2.0 MARKET QUOTES  ----  av_get_pf("IBM","GLOBAL_QUOTE") av_get_pf("USD/BRL","CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_RATE") |> av_extract_fx() av_get_pf(c("ORCL","IBM","EWZ","ARGT"),"REALTIME_BULK_QUOTES",melt=FALSE) # Note you need advanced permissioning for REALTIME_BULK_QUOTES  # ---- 3.0 SINGLE NAME HISTORICAL DATA  ----  av_get_pf("IBM","TIME_SERIES_DAILY") av_get_pf("IBM","TIME_SERIES_INTRADAY")  # ---- 4.0 MARKET PRICING DATA  ----  av_get_pf("","MARKET_STATUS")  |> av_extract_df() av_get_pf("","TOP_GAINERS_LOSERS") |> av_extract_df("top_losers") av_get_pf("","TREASURY_YIELD",maturity='7year')  # ---- 4.0 SINGLE NAME NON-PRICING DATA  ----  av_get_pf("IBM","DIVIDENDS") av_get_pf("IBM","EARNINGS")  |> av_extract_df("quarter",melt=TRUE) av_get_pf("IBM","NEWS_SENTIMENT") |> av_extract_df("feed")  av_get_pf("IBM","EARNINGS_CALL_TRANSCRIPT",quarter="2024Q3")  |> av_extract_df("transcript")  # Note that quarter is a required parameter, not specifying will throw an error   # ---- 5.0 SINGLE NAME OPTION PRICING DATA  ----  av_get_pf("IBM","HISTORICAL_OPTIONS") |> av_grep_opts("F,M,put",mindays=2)  # ---- 6.0 TECHNICAL INDICATORS  ----  av_funhelp("SMA")  # Shows parameters and defaults chosen by this package. av_get_pf("IBM","SMA",time_period=20)  # ---- 7.0 WINDOW ANALYTICS  ----  av_get_pf(c("ORCL","IBM","EWZ","ARGT"),"ANALYTICS_FIXED_WINDOW",verbose=TRUE) |>             av_extract_analytics(separate_vars=TRUE) } # }

title: Extract data from Alpha Vantage returned data — av_grep_opts
text: indta data.table returned av_get_pf() grepstring (default F,M,call,otm,act) Three five item string select specific maturities, option types,  strike ranges, open interest categories option sets returned av_get_pf(.,"HISTORICAL_OPTIONS"). item list abbreviated code select. items case sensitive order spot (default NULL) Spot used determine itm/otm, null inferred money call put Note: parameter applies one symbol indta.  one ticker indta column spot must indta get correct results. mindays (default 3). Minimum number days expiration passed startdt startdt (default Sys.Date()). Date expirations considered. mindelta (default 0.05) delta limit moneyness sides, .e. pass options deltas range c(mindelta,1-mindelta) dropsymbol (default FALSE). Drop symbol returned data table.

title: RShiny App — av_runShiny
text: av_runShiny() runs interactive RShiny app download, manage, visualize data Alpha Vantage data service. app treats equities, ETFs, indices, FX equally, users need know specific API calls integrate data.  Downloaded data cached reduce API calls, data can saved external use, external data can added app.  Sets securities can easily added managed.

code: av_runShiny()

title: RShiny App — av_runShiny
text: Nothing

title: RShiny App — av_runShiny
text: Invocation starts Shiny application.  See vignette full details. first use, click AVOPTS tab, fill following fields,  hit "Set Opts" button. ++AV API Key++: API key obtained  Alpha Vantage ++Entitlement++ Entitlement status (either delayed realtime) options can set given . run analysis, Enter semicolon delimited set securities (e.g. SPY;QQQ;DIA), select runtime option adjacent dropdown, press `RUN button.  Options include: ** Options can set**. click AVOPTS tab, fill following fields,  hit "Set Opts" button. fgts colorset: named list colors can set using  FinanceGraphs::fg_update_aes() function. Regr Significance: p-level highlight significant regressions. (Used HistVolTS function .) Cache Directory: directory internal App data can stored (added ). filled , temporary directory created used. app allows downloaded data saved.  used, data saved one file, stored named (API call function) list data.tables.
